MODULE: cosmos.agents.proactive_agent
FILE: cosmos/agents/proactive_agent.py (469 lines)
CATEGORY: agents

DESCRIPTION: cosmos Proactive Agent - Anticipatory Intelligence

Q2 2025 Feature: Proactive Intelligence
- Anticipatory Suggestions: Predict what the user might need next
- Task Automation: Learn and execute repetitive workflows
- Context Awareness: Adapt to time, mood, and project context

CLASSES:
- ProactiveState(Enum)
- Suggestion: A proactive suggestion for the user.
- ScheduledTask: A task scheduled to run periodically or at a specific time.
- ProactiveAgent: Agent responsible for background monitoring and proactive assistance.
  Methods: async def start(self)
  Methods: async def stop(self)
  Methods: def add_scheduled_task(self, description: str, schedule_type: str='interval', schedule_value: Any=36
  Methods: def remove_scheduled_task(self, task_id: str) -> bool
  Methods: def get_pending_suggestions(self) -> list[Suggestion]
  Methods: def dismiss_suggestion(self, suggestion_id: str) -> bool
  Methods: def accept_suggestion(self, suggestion_id: str) -> Optional[Suggestion]
  Methods: def get_status(self) -> dict
